title: 1 step DFU - Language update  when only EB has update
scenario: 1-step DFU language update when only Earbuds have a firmware update and Charge Case is already on the latest version
steps: Start the app with Osprey when only the Earbuds (EB) have a firmware update and the Charge Case (CC) is already on the latest version.
Tap "Update Now" — the Software Update screen should be displayed.
Complete the Language change DFU — both language change and DFU should finish successfully, and Earbuds should be updated to the latest firmware.
Check the language on the Charge Case by navigating menus on the touch screen.
expected: The language change and DFU should both finish successfully. The Earbuds should be updated to the latest firmware. The language on the Charge Case should be properly changed.
